signals.headline: White House Confirms President Trump’s Full Confidence in VP Vance and Sec
signals.raw:
White House Confirms President Trump’s Full Confidence in VP Vance and Sec. Rubio Amid Iran War Policy Tensions | NO | HIGH confidence** [1]

The White House issued an unsolicited statement on Wednesday affirming "President Trump has full confidence in both Vice President Vance and Secretary Rubio," addressing speculation about their differing stances on the ongoing Iran war launched by Trump.[1]

signals.headline: South Korea March 2026 Inflation Confirmed at 2
signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 Inflation Confirmed at 2.2% (Below Forecast)** | YES | HIGH  
Annual inflation rose to 2.2% from 2.0% prior, missing 2.4% expectations per Statistics Korea data; aligns with BoK target amid energy volatility, potentially impacting rate cut bets.[1]

signals.headline: RLUSD Stablecoin Full Rollout Across XRP Ledger & Ethereum | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
RLUSD Stablecoin Full Rollout Across XRP Ledger & Ethereum | YES | HIGH confidence**

Ripple USD (RLUSD) has officially completed full-scale deployment across both the XRP Ledger and Ethereum[2]. This represents a major ecosystem expansion with record-breaking transaction volumes on the XRPL[2].

signals.headline: SEC Legal Battle Officially Resolved | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
SEC Legal Battle Officially Resolved | YES | HIGH confidence**

The long-standing SEC legal dispute with Ripple is now definitively closed and "officially in the rearview mirror"[2], removing a major regulatory overhang that had constrained XRP adoption.

signals.headline: XRP ETF Approvals Entering Final Stage | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
XRP ETF Approvals Entering Final Stage | YES | HIGH confidence**

Institutional XRP ETF approvals are in their final approval phase[2], with potential institutional adoption at "all-time high" levels[2].

January 2026 World Economic Outlook update lifted projection from 1.8% (prior), driven by AI/semiconductor recovery; doubles from 2025's 1.0%, matching KDI outlook.[2][5]

signals.headline: CLARITY Act Senate Markup Window Opens April 13 | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
CLARITY Act Senate Markup Window Opens April 13 | YES | HIGH confidence**

The Senate Banking Committee markup for the CLARITY Act—which could reclassify XRP under federal law and allow banks to use XRP directly for liquidity[4][5]—opened as of April 13, 2026[5].

signals.headline: Price Action: XRP Trading $1
signals.raw:
Price Action: XRP Trading $1.30–$1.45 Range | YES | MED confidence**

XRP has gained only 2–3% in early April trading, consolidating between $1.30 support and $1.50 resistance[4]. A sustained break above $1.49 could target $1.60, while failure to hold support risks a drop to $1.15[3].
